raw_consumer_statement: Reference my XX/XX/XXXX statement for XXXX XXXX XXXX ( Barclays Bank ) ; I was charged with a Balance Transfer ( XXXX XX/XX/XXXX ) by XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$5000.00} and a Balance Transfer Fee of {$250.00}. On XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, I called XXXX to dispute the charges as FRAUDULENT. Finally, the Fraudulent Security Team ( XXXX ) to me that they would have the account corrected and issue me a new card. I did receive a new card in the mail and a new statement with $ XXXX balance. On XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, I received a letter from Barclays stating that my account was closed due to suspicious activity and that I would not held responsible for any activity confirmed fraudulent. With my new card, I received a statement balance of {$4900.00} dated XXXX XX/XX/XXXX and a Balance Transfer fee of {$190.00} for new charge on XXXX XXXX XXXX. I forwarded a dispute letter by Certified Mail on XXXX XX/XX/XXXX.
